alasaka a. Indolent, idle.
— kaḥ Flatulence, intumescence of the abdomen, with constipation and wind; prayāti nordhvaṃ nādhastādāhāro na ca pacyate . āmāśayo'lasībhūtastena so'lasakaḥ smṛtaḥ ..
